description: User-outcome baseline (ORCH-14 / PROD-10, Launch-Blocker item 3). Per the D-equal decision all 7 systems are measured equally. X = interaction `steps` + wall-time to a legal non-trivial character sheet; Y = `legal` (a coherent, zero-error sheet whose core derived roll computes a valid formula). FLOOR: every system must stay legal. `timeBudgetMs` is a generous regression ceiling (CI/browser timing varies, so it guards against hangs, not micro-perf); change only via a reviewed ratchet.

dnd-5e-2014.nonTrivial: Fighter (Champion) at total level 5; Strength save roll

dnd-5e-2024.nonTrivial: Fighter at total level 5; Acrobatics check roll

pf2e.nonTrivial: Level-5 Fighter (key ability + Class DC wired); Perception roll

mam3e.nonTrivial: Power Level 12 superhero; Perception check roll
